channel.title: US Top News and Analysis
channel.description: CNBC is the world leader in business news and real-time financial market coverage. Find fast, actionable information.

item.title: Trump proposes 20% toll on cargo through Strait of Hormuz; restarts Iran blockade
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz is a major oil shipping route and the epicenter of the U.S. and Israel's ongoing war with Iran.

item.title: South Carolina governor taps Lindsey Graham's sister to serve as interim senator
item.description: The death of Sen. Lindsey Graham ignited a scramble among South Carolina Republicans to prepare for a special primary election to replace him on the GOP ticket.

item.title: Judge says Trump sued IRS for 'improper purpose'; refers his lawyer to bar
item.description: Trump's lawsuit against the IRS was settled by the Justice Department with an agreement to create a $1.8 billion "lawfare" fund that has since been scrapped.

item.title: Stock futures are little changed as Middle East tensions escalate; traders await earnings and inflation data: Live updates
item.description: Oil prices surged and stocks slid on Monday after President Donald Trump said he would reinstate a blockade on Iranian shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Inflation reports expected to show improvement with a caveat; Warsh heads to Capitol Hill
item.description: Tumbling oil prices in June are likely to provide some welcome good news for inflation.

item.title: Protect your portfolio from volatility with these high-dividend stocks, Jefferies says
item.description: These stocks can help investors seek shelter from the rocky market, according to Jefferies.

item.title: Trump to claim declassified intel reveals 2020 election interference: MS NOW
item.description: Trump said he will make a "Speech to the Nation on Thursday evening, at 9 P.M. Eastern," without providing further details.

item.title: Chipotle is opening its first restaurant in Mexico
item.description: Fast casual chain Chipotle announced Monday that it is opening its first location in Mexico in the Monterrey area.

item.title: UN maritime agency opposes Hormuz transit fees after Trump demands protection money
item.description: The security situation in Hormuz has deteriorated since Iran attacked multiple commercial ships transiting the strait over the past week.

item.title: Paramount, WBD hit with lawsuit from 12 states, including California, to block merger
item.description: A group of states, including California, filed a lawsuit to block the merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery.

item.title: The 10 best state economies in America in 2026
item.description: Economy is one of the most important categories in CNBC’s annual America’s Top States for Business rankings. Several states stand out for economic strength.

item.title: The 10 worst state economies in America in 2026
item.description: Economy is a key category in CNBC’s America’s Top States for Business study, and some states stand out for the wrong reasons.

item.title: Waller says Fed shouldn't 'fight the last war' on inflation but warns hikes still possible
item.description: The Fed governor said inflation has expanded beyond the often-cited drivers such as the energy price spike in tariffs.

item.title: 3 things you need to know about cyclospora
item.description: Cyclospora, a parasitic infection that can cause weeks of severe diarrhea, is spreading in the U.S. Here's what to know about the disease, and how to stay safe.

item.title: A streaming stock risks diving below its key support level this week. Here's what else Jay Woods is watching
item.description: NYSE insider Jay Woods is keeping an eye on Netflix in advance of its latest financial results due out later this week. Here's what else he's watching.

item.title: Jim Cramer says tech remains the market's best place to find big winners despite recent struggles
item.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said tech stocks continue to offer the market's biggest upside.

item.title: Trump administration urges banks to scrutinize lending to immigrants without work authorization
item.description: Federal bank regulators issued guidance Monday seeking to curb mortgages, auto loans and other consumer credit to immigrants without U.S. work authorization.

item.title: SpaceX stock sinks for a second-straight day, nearing $135 IPO price
item.description: SpaceX went public a month ago in a record IPO. Elon Musk's space and AI company was added to the Nasdaq-100 last week.

item.title: A July rate hike from the Fed? The odds are rising
item.description: Chances of a rate hike in July by the Federal Reserve rose as oil prices jumped on the latest developments in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Traders are betting on a comeback quarter for Netflix
item.description: Options traders are striking a decidedly bullish tone heading into the streaming giant's earnings on Thursday.

item.title: A toxic stew drags stocks lower as we look at what can get the AI trade back on track
item.description: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

item.title: The new housing bill won't provide fast relief. These mortgage tools can help you right now
item.description: A comprehensive, bipartisan housing bill recently went into effect. Here's how it may impact homeowners and homebuyers.

item.title: Trump calls for Congress to pass Clarity Act crypto bill to honor Lindsey Graham
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee approved the bill 15-9 in May, with two Democrats joining Republicans to advance the legislation.

item.title: Big banks poised to report booming revenue propelled by SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility
item.description: Big banks are set to report booming Q2 revenue as the SpaceX IPO, Iran war volatility and a rebound in commercial lending fuel Wall Street's "sweet spot."

item.title: U.S. appeals court revives private lawsuits linking Tylenol to autism
item.description: There is no firm scientific evidence linking Tylenol use during pregnancy to autism and attention ⁠deficit hyperactivity ‌disorder in children.

item.title: Meta's Louisiana data center investment to reach $50 billion, aided by generous tax incentives
item.description: Meta said the planned Hyperion data center supercluster in Richland Parish, Louisiana, will be a 5GW facility and cost more than $50 billion.

item.title: Khosla family agrees to purchase defending Super Bowl champion Seattle Seahawks for $9.612 billion, sources say
item.description: Paul Allen's estate announced on Feb. 18 that it was selling the team, which is coming off its second Super Bowl victory in franchise history.

item.title: Kalshi launches 'Pro' product for users trading multiple markets at same time, perpetual futures
item.description: The platform is designed to alleviate problems the company's most active traders have run into, according to a memo provided to CNBC.

item.title: Burnout, frustration and heartbreak: Amazon layoffs take their toll in saturated job market
item.description: In the eight-plus months since Amazon announced its most expansive job cuts ever, laid off workers have been thrust into an increasingly saturated labor market.

item.title: Graham’s death complicates myriad GOP goals in Congress
item.description: South Carolina Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham died unexpectedly at 71.
